column1: 2. Cross sections: Same as 2022 (same physics at 13.6 TeV). Cross sections marked VERIFY need checking against latest XSDB/twiki.
3. No ext (extension) samples found for 2024 - only single versions of each sample
4. Sample naming conventions changed: (a) Par-M-125 instead of M-125; (b) dashes instead of underscores in some places; (c) 5FS t-channel samples gone replaced by 4FS TBbarQ/TbarBQ naming
5. DY and W+jets: No inclusive samples available yet. Only PTLL/PTLNu-binned or per-jet-multiplicity-binned versions exist.
6. Data: 2024 NanoAODv15 not yet processed. Muon stream split into Muon0/Muon1. Eras: B-I.
7. Several Higgs samples (ZH HtoWW; VBFHTo2Tau; WH HtoTau; bbH; ZHto2Zto4L) not yet available for 2024.
8. H+c and H+b signal samples require private production for 2024 conditions.
